usecase.name: [Sample App] Date Workflow — Compare two blog post dates
usecase.description: End-to-end exercise of the v1 date feature: visit two blog posts, capture each rendered date directly as a canonical UTC ISO string via retrieve_value with value_type=date, compute the day difference, add a 7-day duration, and assert the first post is after the second using validation_type=date. Note: this test lives under sample-app rather than app/ (see spec Task 11) because the sample-app blog renders predictable dates we can author against; the QA Studio dashboard's dates depend on dynamic execution state.

steps.instruction: Wait for the blog post detail page to load and the post date to be visible near the post title
Return the post's published date as it appears on the page (e.g. 'March 15, 2026')
Click the back arrow / Back to Blog link
Click the second blog post card
Return the post's published date as it appears on the page
Compute the difference between the two captured dates in days (post1 - post2)
Add 7 days to the second post's date to demonstrate add_duration
Assert that the first post's date is strictly after the second post's date
